title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0093 43a (Land adjacent to 43), Ambleside Avenue, Bristol
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Tom Upton  Site address:  43a (Land adjacent to 43), Ambleside Avenue, Bristol  Description of proposed development:  Demolition of existing side extension and lean-to structure and erection of a three-bedroom semi-detached dwelling  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 28 March 2025   Date by when representations must be made 2 May 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 23 May 2025   Decision date 5 June 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 179 KB, 9 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 2 May 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0093 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     24 02821 F-APPLICATION FORM-3725777  (PDF, 1.02 MB, 14 pages)  24 02821 F-CIL - FORM 1 QUESTION FORM ADDITIONAL INFORMATION-3740056  (PDF, 134 KB, 6 pages)  2413 Ambleside Avenue Design and Access Statement  (PDF, 20.8 MB, 20 pages)  2413 Ambleside Avenue Planning Statement  (PDF, 698 KB, 16 pages)  2413 AmblesideAvenue Planning CIL form  (PDF, 135 KB, 6 pages)  2413-P-001-Site Location Plans  (PDF, 73.8 KB, 1 page)  2413-P-010-Existing Block Plan  (PDF, 68.5 KB, 1 page)  2413-P-050-Existing Elevations  (PDF, 108 KB, 1 page)  2413-P-110-Proposed Block Plan  (PDF, 67.5 KB, 1 page)  2413-P-111-Existing Site Plan  (PDF, 63.3 KB, 1 page)  2413-P-120-Proposed Ground Floor Plan  (PDF, 80.2 KB, 1 page)  2413-P-121-Proposed First Floor Plan  (PDF, 88.5 KB, 1 page)  2413-P-122-Proposed Second Floor Plan  (PDF, 104 KB, 1 page)  2413-P-124-Proposed...
